# link11waap_certificates (Data Source)

Lists all certificates in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Certificates Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

# List all certificates
data "link11waap_certificates" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "certificate_count" {
  value = length(data.link11waap_certificates.all.certificates)
}

output "certificates" {
  value = [for cert in data.link11waap_certificates.all.certificates : {
    id      = cert.id
    name    = cert.name
    subject = cert.subject
    expires = cert.expires
  }]
}

# Get a specific certificate by ID
data "link11waap_certificates" "by_id" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
  id        = "placeholder"
}

output "placeholder_cert" {
  value = data.link11waap_certificates.by_id.id
}

# Get a specific certificate by name
data "link11waap_certificates" "by_name" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
  name      = "my-cert-name"
}

output "cert_by_name" {
  value = data.link11waap_certificates.by_name.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Optional

- `id` (String) Certificate ID. If specified, only the certificate with this ID will be returned.
- `name` (String) Certificate Name. If specified, only the certificate with this name will be returned.

### Read-Only

- `certificates` (Attributes List) List of certificates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--certificates))

<a id="nestedatt--certificates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `certificates`

Read-Only:

- `expires` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `issuer` (String)
- `le_auto_renew` (Boolean)
- `le_auto_replace` (Boolean)
- `links` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--certificates--links))
- `name` (String)
- `revoked` (Boolean)
- `san` (List of String)
- `side` (String)
- `subject` (String)
- `uploaded` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--certificates--links"></a>
### Nested Schema for `certificates.links`

Read-Only:

- `link` (String)
- `provider` (String)
- `region` (String)
